name: Site Blocker
description: Block distracting websites and boost your productivity. Manage up to 100 sites with individual toggle controls and a math-challenge child safety gate.
longDescription: Take control of your browsing. Block up to 100 distracting websites with a clean side panel interface. Includes individual toggle controls per site, a master switch, subdomain blocking, and an optional math-challenge gate that prevents children from modifying the blocklist.

featureGrid.title: Block 100 Sites
featureGrid.description: Add any domain and it's blocked immediately across all subdomains.

featureGrid.title: Individual Toggles
featureGrid.description: Pause blocking per site without removing it from your list.

featureGrid.title: Master Switch
featureGrid.description: Turn all blocking on/off with one click. Your list is preserved.

featureGrid.title: Child Safety
featureGrid.description: Math question gate prevents kids from modifying settings.

featureGrid.title: Subdomain Blocking
featureGrid.description: Block facebook.com and all variants are blocked too.

featureGrid.title: Side Panel UI
featureGrid.description: Modern interface in the browser sidebar. No popups.

name: QR Code Generator
description: Generate QR codes instantly for any URL or text, right from your browser sidebar. Lightweight, fast, and privacy-friendly with a clean side panel UI.
longDescription: Generate QR codes instantly for any URL or text, right from your browser sidebar. A simple, lightweight side panel extension — no sign-up, no external scripts, just fast QR code generation.

featureGrid.title: Instant Generation
featureGrid.description: Enter any URL or text and get a scannable QR code in seconds.

featureGrid.title: Side Panel UI
featureGrid.description: Opens in the browser sidebar without leaving your current tab.

featureGrid.title: Clean Design
featureGrid.description: Distraction-free card layout with a polished blue theme.

featureGrid.title: Responsive
featureGrid.description: Works beautifully on any screen size. Scan with any mobile device.

featureGrid.title: Lightweight
featureGrid.description: Pure HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS. No frameworks, no bloat.

featureGrid.title: No Sign-Up
featureGrid.description: Works right away. No account, no login, no setup needed.

name: Image Editor
description: A full image editing toolkit in your browser sidebar. Crop, resize, apply 8 filters, 8 presets, and 12 creative pixel-manipulation effects — all without leaving your tab.
longDescription: A lightweight, privacy-first image editor that lives in your browser's side panel. Crop, resize, apply 8 filter sliders, 8 one-click presets, and 12 unique creative pixel-manipulation effects — all without leaving your current tab.

featureGrid.title: Crop
featureGrid.description: Drag handles with 5 aspect ratio presets and pixel input.

featureGrid.title: Resize
featureGrid.description: Scale by dimension or percentage with locked aspect ratio.

featureGrid.title: 16 Filters
featureGrid.description: 8 adjustable sliders plus 8 one-click presets.

featureGrid.title: 12 Creative Effects
featureGrid.description: Memory Drift, Signal Corruption, Time Slice, and more.

featureGrid.title: Multi-format Export
featureGrid.description: Save as PNG, JPEG, or WebP with quality control.

featureGrid.title: Page Image Detection
featureGrid.description: Scan and edit any image on the current page.

name: PiP Camera
description: A tiny, always-on-top camera feed that floats in the corner of your screen. Open your webcam in picture-in-picture mode while browsing, presenting, or video chatting.
longDescription: A tiny, always-on-top camera feed that floats in the corner of your screen using the browser's native Picture-in-Picture API. Keep your webcam visible while browsing, presenting, or video chatting — without switching tabs.

featureGrid.title: Picture-in-Picture
featureGrid.description: Uses the browser's native PiP API for a floating, always-on-top window.

featureGrid.title: One-click Launch
featureGrid.description: Open your camera in seconds — no setup, no permissions dance.

featureGrid.title: Always on Top
featureGrid.description: The feed stays visible while you browse, present, or video chat.

featureGrid.title: Privacy Focused
featureGrid.description: No recording, no storage, no data ever leaves your device.

featureGrid.title: Lightweight
featureGrid.description: Pure HTML/CSS/JS. No dependencies. Loads instantly.

featureGrid.title: Free & Open Source
featureGrid.description: MIT licensed. Audit it, fork it, or contribute on GitHub.

name: QR Code Reader
description: A fast, private QR code scanner. Point your webcam at any QR code for instant decoding, or upload a screenshot. 100% local processing — no data collected or transmitted.
longDescription: A fast, private QR code scanner available as a browser extension and web app. Point your webcam at any QR code for instant decoding, or upload a screenshot. All processing happens locally — no data is collected or transmitted.

featureGrid.title: Camera Scanning
featureGrid.description: Point your webcam at any QR code for instant decoding.

featureGrid.title: Image File Scanning
featureGrid.description: Upload a screenshot or photo containing a QR code.

featureGrid.title: 100% Private
featureGrid.description: All processing happens locally in your browser. No data sent.

featureGrid.title: Clean Modern UI
featureGrid.description: Gradient-themed design with smooth animations.

featureGrid.title: Lightweight
featureGrid.description: No background processes. Only runs when you open it.

featureGrid.title: Free & Open Source
featureGrid.description: MIT licensed, no ads, no premium tiers.

name: VocabBuilder
description: Master vocabulary through spaced repetition — right in your browser sidebar. Four difficulty levels including GMAT/GRE/LSAT words, streak tracking, and daily reminders.
longDescription: Master vocabulary through spaced repetition — right in your browser sidebar. VocabBuilder serves you one word per day and schedules reviews at progressive intervals (1→3→7→14→30 days) so words move from short-term to long-term memory efficiently.

featureGrid.title: 4 Difficulty Levels
featureGrid.description: Simple, Medium, Complex, and Competitive (GMAT/GRE/LSAT) word sets.

featureGrid.title: Spaced Repetition
featureGrid.description: Progressive 1→3→7→14→30 day review intervals for lasting retention.

featureGrid.title: Streak & Badges
featureGrid.description: Daily streak counter with milestone badges at 3, 7, 30, and 365 days.

featureGrid.title: Daily Reminders
featureGrid.description: 9 AM browser notification keeps vocabulary building a daily habit.

featureGrid.title: Progress Dashboard
featureGrid.description: Track streaks, words learned, daily goal, and monthly totals.

featureGrid.title: 100% Local
featureGrid.description: All data in Chrome Storage API — no accounts, no tracking, no cloud.
